definition: The monetary policy transmission mechanism is partially broken: interest rate channel at ~60% effectiveness (mortgage lock-in), credit channel at ~80%, asset price channel at negative effectiveness (AI rally counteracted tightening with $10-15T market cap gain), exchange rate channel at ~50%, expectations channel at ~50-70%. Financial conditions loosened through 2023-2025 despite the most aggressive hiking cycle since Volcker.
evidence: 1/7 historical base rate for FCI easing during tightening (14%, 95% CI: [0.4%, 58%])
85%+ of outstanding mortgages below 5% creating mortgage lock-in with no pre-2020 parallel
AI wealth effect of $10-15T documented in market data and TIC flows
Stripping equities from FCI, remaining components show tightening consistent with prior cycles
Channel effectiveness: interest rate ~60%, credit ~80%, exchange rate ~50%, asset-price negative
2004-06 Conundrum closest analogue (7.5/10 similarity), resolved discontinuously with IG spreads 50bp to 600bp+
Mortgage lock-in at ~3.5% pre-pandemic rates neutralizes interest rate channel for ~80% of homeowners
AI wealth effects counteract asset price channel
Rates at ~7-9% needed to fully offset fiscal impulse would generate ~$2.5-3.2T annual interest expense
Not 'broken' but transmission working exactly as sectoral balances predict under high debt/GDP
open_questions: What is the precise FCI miscalibration magnitude (40-200bp range)?
Does broken transmission prevent the correlation regime from resolving?
Is the break qualitatively novel (reversed channel) or a more severe version of historical episodes?
Does resolution depend on AI equity normalization or structural toolkit reform?
What is the most likely resolution path — historical pattern suggests longer broken leads to more violent reconnection
Will mortgage lock-in diminish as pre-pandemic mortgages mature or are refinanced?
Is the Fed's effective toolkit bandwidth truly ~155-240bp or could unconventional tools expand it?
At what debt/GDP threshold does the Kalecki recycling channel overwhelm monetary transmission entirely?
